UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing crucial emergency contacts, medical records, and preferred language

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth User ID

bloodGroup.description: Blood group of the user (e.g., O+, A-, etc.)

medicalConditions.description: Known medical conditions, drug allergies, or current medications

preferredLanguage.description: User's UI language preference (en, si, or ta)

EmergencyAlert.title: EmergencyAlert
EmergencyAlert.description: Crucial logs of emergency SOS button presses and incident details with GPS tracking

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who triggered the SOS, or 'anonymous'

timestamp.description: The server or device timestamp when the alarm was triggered

type.description: Category of emergency (e.g., Panic, Accident, Medical, Fire, Poisoning)

accuracy.description: GPS location precision radius in meters

description.description: Short summary of the emergency context

status.description: Current tracking status of the rescue response

users/{userId}.description: Publicly editable but privately read-restricted profile data containing emergency contact and language configurations.

alerts/{alertId}.description: Global dispatch alerts list created during SOS triggers, readable by emergency team responders.
